name: ipsn-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM/IEEE IPSN (Information Processing in Sensor Networks), the CPS-IoT Week venue for sensing theory, on-device/TinyML, and localization: routing between the Information Processing (IP) and Sensor Platforms, Tools and Design Methods (SPOTS) tracks, double-blind HotCRP submission on the ACM template, real-deployment evidence, the Best Research Artifact Award, and the honest reality that IPSN merged into the new SenSys (Embedded AI and Sensing Systems) from 2025-2026. Grounded in the IPSN 2024 (23rd, Hong Kong) call, CPS-IoT Week pages, ACM DL, IEEE Xplore, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
